member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase
member.summary: Represents the base class of annotations for the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.Attachment
member.summary: Gets or sets the attachment of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.Location
member.summary: Gets or sets the location of annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.PointIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the data point index of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.SeriesIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the data series index of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.TooltipText
member.summary: Gets or sets the tooltip of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationBase.Style
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationLayer.Annotations
member.summary: Gets the collection of annotation elements in the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationLayer.Chart
member.summary: Gets or sets the associated chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.AnnotationLayer.DrawOnTop
member.summary: Gets or sets the value which indicates whether to draw annotaions on the top of the chart.
member.remarks: Default value is true and the annotations are rendered on the top of the chart. If false, the annotations are drawn behind the chart, over the chart's background.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Circle.Radius
member.summary: Gets or sets the radius of circle annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Ellipse.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of ellipse annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Ellipse.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of ellipse annotation.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Image
member.summary: Represents an image annotation for the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Image.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the for image annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Image.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of image annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Image.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of image annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Line.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start point of line annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Line.End
member.summary: Gets or sets the end point of the line annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Polygon.Points
member.summary: Gets the collection of points of the polygon annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Polygon.ContentCenter
member.summary: Gets or sets the center of annotation's content. If the property value is null (default value), the position of content is selected automatically.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Rectangle.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of rectangle annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Rectangle.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of rectangle annotation.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Shape
member.summary: Represents a base class of shape annotations for the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Shape.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the text of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Shape.ContentStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the label style of annotation.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Square
member.summary: Represents a square annotation for the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Square.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the square annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Template.AnnoTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the of annotation.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Text
member.summary: Represents a text annotation for the

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Text.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the text of the annotation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Annotation.Text.Angle
member.summary: Gets or sets the annotaion angle.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker
member.summary: Represents a Box-whisker series of FlexChart.
member.remarks: The series is normally used to compare distributions between different sets of numerical data.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.ShowMeanLine
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show the mean line for the Box-whisker series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.QuartileCalculation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the quartile calculation for the Box-whisker series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.ShowOutliers
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show the outliers for the Box-whisker series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.GapWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines the gap width as a percentage for the Box-Whisker series.
member.remarks: The default value for this property is 0.1. The min value is 0 and max value is 1.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.GroupWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines the group width as a percentage for the Box-Whisker series.
member.remarks: The default value for this property is 0.8. The min value is 0 and max value is 1.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.ShowMeanMarks
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show the mean marker for the Box-whisker series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BoxWhisker.ShowInnerPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show the inner points for the Box-whisker series.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven
member.summary: Represents a BreakEven series for FlexChart.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of BreakEven series class.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.FixedCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the fixed cost value.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.VariableCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the variable cost value.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.SalesPrice
member.summary: Gets or sets the sales price value.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.GetTotalCost(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the total cost for the specifies number of units.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.BreakEven.GetSalesRevenue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the sales revenue for the specifies number of units.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.ClusterSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the cluster size.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.BubbleMinSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimal symbol size for bubble chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.BubbleMaxSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum symbol size for bubble chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.FunnelNeckWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the neck width as percentage for the Funnel chart.
member.remarks: NeckWidth doesn't work if is set to

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.FunnelNeckHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the neck height as percentage for the Funnel chart.
member.remarks: NeckHeight doesn't work if is set to

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.FunnelType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of Funnel chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.HistogramCumulativeMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the histogram cumulative mode.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.HistogramBinWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the histogram bin width.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.HistogramNormalCurve
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whather to show histogram norma curve.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartOptions.HistogramAppearance
member.summary: Gets or sets the histogram appearance.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle
member.summary: Represents visual style of chart element.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.FontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the font size.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.FontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.FontStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the font style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.FontStretch
member.summary: Gets or sets the font stretch.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.FontWeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the font weight.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.StrokeDashArray
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke dash array.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.LinePattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the Line Pattern.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.Stroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke brush.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.Fill
member.summary: Gets or sets the fill brush.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.StrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke thickness.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of ChartStyle class.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.ChartStyle.#ctor(C1.Chart._Style)
member.summary: Creates an instance of ChartStyle class.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase
member.summary: Base class for chart data labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content of data labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.Border
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the label has border.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.ConnectingLine
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the data labels have a line connecting them with corresponding data point.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset of data label from corresponding data point.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.Style
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of the label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabelBase.BorderStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the border style of the label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of data labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.Overlapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the value which indicates how to handle overlapped data labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.OverlappingOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the label overlapping options.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.ContentOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the data label content options.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.Angle
member.summary: Gets or sets the label rotation angle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.MaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum width of data label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.MaxLines
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of lines in data label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.DataLabel.MaxAutoLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of labels for automatic positioning.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PieDataLabel.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of data labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PieDataLabel.Overlapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the overlapping mode for data labels.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar
member.remarks: The series helps you see margins of error and standard deviations at a glance. They can be shown as a standard error amount, a percentage, or a standard deviation. You can also set your own values to display the exact error amounts you want.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.Direction
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the direction of the error.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.EndStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the end style of the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.ErrorAmount
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the error amount of the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.CustomPlusErrorValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the custom plus error value.
member.remarks: If ErrorAmount is ErrorAmount.Custom, the value will be used.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.CustomMinusErrorValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the cumstom minus error value.
member.remarks: If ErrorAmount is ErrorAmount.Custom, the value will be used.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.ErrorValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the error value of the series.
member.remarks: This property should be work with errorAmount property. If errorAmount is ErrorAmount.FixedValue, the value property is a fixed number value. If errorAmount is ErrorAmount.Percentage, the value property is a percentage number value between 0 and 1. If errorAmount is ErrorAmount.StandardDeviation, the value property is a percentage number of calculated standard deviation value.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.ErrorBar.ErrorBarStyle
member.summary: Gets the style of the error bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderSymbolEventArgs.Point
member.summary: Gets the symbol position in control pixel coordinates.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase
member.summary: Base class for FlexChart and FlexPie controls.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.Palette
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart palette.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.SelectionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart selection mode.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.SelectedIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the index of selected element.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.SelectionStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of selected element.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.Binding
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains Y values for the series.
member.remarks: For complex chart types it may contain several names separated by commas.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of objects that contains the series data.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendToggle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether clicking legend items toggles the series visibility in the chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.Header
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart header text.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.Footer
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart footer text.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.HeaderStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets chart header style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.PlotStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets chart plot area style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.HeaderAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets chart header alignment.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.FooterStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets chart footer style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.FooterAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets chart footer alignment.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart legend position.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend title.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendReversed
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the legend is reversed.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendTitleStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend title style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendGroupHeaderStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend title style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendOrientation
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend orientation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendTextWrapping
member.summary: Gets or sets legend text wrap mode.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend item MaxWidth.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.ToolTipContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart tooltip content.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.ToolTip
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart tooltip.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.CustomPalette
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom chart palette.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendScrollBarStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of legend scroll bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.LegendScrollBars
member.summary: Gets or sets which scroll bars should appear in legend.

member.name: E:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.SelectionChanged
member.summary: Fires after selected element was changed.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.BeginUpdate
member.summary: Suspends notifications until the next call to EndUpdate.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.EndUpdate
member.summary: Resumes notifications suspended by calls to BeginUpdate.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.SaveImage(System.IO.Stream,C1.WPF.Chart.ImageFormat,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Windows.Media.Color},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Saves chart as image with to the specified stream.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.HitTest(System.Windows.Point)
member.summary: Gets a HitTestInfo object with information about the specified point.
member.returns: A HitTestInfo object with information about the point.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexChartBase.GetContent(C1.Chart.HitTestInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the content by specified template.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexPieSlice
member.summary: This class is used in design-time.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexPieSlice.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of Name property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexPieSlice.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of Value property.

member.name: E:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexPieSlice.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Fires when property has been changed.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.FlexPieSliceCollection
member.summary: Provides access to an ordered, strongly typed collection of objects.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.BindingName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains the name of the data item.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.Reversed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether angles are reversed (counter-clockwise).
member.remarks: The default value is false, which causes angles to be measured in the clockwise direction.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset of the slices from the pie center.
member.remarks: The offset is measured as a fraction of the pie radius.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.InnerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the pie's inner radius.
member.remarks: The inner radius is measured as a fraction of the pie radius. The default value for this property is zero, which creates a pie. Setting this property to values greater than zero creates pies with a hole in the middle, also known as doughnut charts.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.StartAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting angle for the pie slices, in degrees.
member.remarks: Angles are measured clockwise, starting at the 9 o'clock position.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.SelectedItemOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset of the selected slice from the pie center.
member.remarks: Offsets are measured as a fraction of the pie radius.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.SelectedItemPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of the selected slice.
member.remarks: Setting this property to a value other than 'None' causes the pie to rotate when an item is selected. Note that in order to select slices by clicking the chart, you must set the SelectionMode property to "Point".

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.DataLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the data label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.Titles
member.summary: Gets or sets the pie titles.
member.remarks: The titles are shown above each pie chart when multiple properties are specified in Binding. If the Titles is null (default value) the binding property names are used as pie titles.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexPie.HitTest(System.Windows.Point)
member.summary: Gets a HitTestInfo object with information about the specified point.
member.returns: A HitTestInfo object with information about the point.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderPieDataLabelEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Data label text. It can be changed in event handler.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexRadar
member.summary: Charting control for radar and polar charts.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexRadar.StartAngle
member.summary: Gets or set the starting angle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexRadar.Reversed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating direction of plotting.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of Histogram class.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.GetValues(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the array of data values.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.BinWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a positive decimal number for the range of a bin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.CumulativeMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the cumulative mode state

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.CumulativeModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the cumulative mode dependency property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.AppearanceType
member.summary: Gets or sets the Appearance Type.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.NormalCurve
member.summary: Gets or sets the NormalCurve property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Histogram.FrequencyPolygonStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the FrequencyPolygonStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.NormalCurve.Visible
member.summary: Gets or sets the visible of Normal Curve

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.NormalCurve.LineStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the LineStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.IChartLayer.Chart
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent chart.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.GestureMode
member.summary: Specifies available values for gesture direction.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.GestureMode.XY
member.summary: Causes behavior along both x- and y- axes.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.IBehavior
member.summary: Represents the behaviors that interact with users.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.IBehavior.OnAttach
member.summary: Called after the behavior is attached to an associated chart.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.IBehavior.OnDetach
member.summary: Called after the behavior is detached to an associated chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.ZoomBehavior.ZoomMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the gesture direction of zoom behavior.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.TranslateBehavior.TranslationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the gesture direction of translate behavior.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1AxisScrollbar
member.summary: Represents a FlexChart range slider control supporting additional visual styles.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1AxisScrollbar.ScrollButtonsVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets the decrease button and increase button is visible or not.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1AxisScrollbar.SelectedAreaBrush
member.summary: Gets or sets the brush of selected area.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1AxisScrollbar.OnApplyTemplate
member.summary: Builds the visual tree for the control when a new template is applied.
member.remarks: This method is invoked whenever application code or an internal process, such as a rebuilding layout pass, calls the method.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerInteraction
member.summary: Specifies how the LineMarker interacts with the user.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerInteraction.None
member.summary: No interaction, the user specifies the position by clicking.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerInteraction.Move
member.summary: The LineMarker moves with the pointer.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerInteraction.Drag
member.summary: The LineMarker moves when the user drags the line.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerLines
member.summary: Specifies the line type for the LineMarker.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerLines.Both
member.summary: Show both vertical and horizontal lines.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment
member.summary: Specifies the alignment of the LineMarker.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.Auto
member.summary: The LineMarker alignment adjusts automatically so that it stays inside the boundaries of the plot area.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.Bottom
member.summary: The LineMarker aligns to the bottom of the pointer.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.Left
member.summary: The LineMarker aligns to the left of the pointer.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.Right
member.summary: The LineMarker aligns to the right of the pointer.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.Top
member.summary: The LineMarker aligns to the top of the pointer.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.PlotTop
member.summary: The LineMarker content displayed at the top of the plot, above the plot area.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.PlotBottom
member.summary: The LineMarker content displayed at the bottom of the plot, below the plot area.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.PlotLeft
member.summary: The LineMarker content displayed on the left side of the plot.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.LineMarkerAlignment.PlotRight
member.summary: The LineMarker content displayed on the right side of the plot.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.PositionChangedArgs
member.summary: Represents the arguments of PositionChanged event.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.PositionChangedArgs.Position
member.summary: Gets the target point at which to show the LineMarker.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker
member.summary: Represents an extension of the LineMarker for the FlexChart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.X
member.summary: Gets the current x-value as chart data coordinates.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.Y
member.summary: Gets the current y-value as chart data coordinates.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.Alignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the alignment of the LineMarker content.
member.remarks: By default, the LineMarker shows to the right, at the bottom of the target point. Use "|" to combine alignment values.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content function that allows you to customize the text content of the LineMarker.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.DragContent
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the content of the marker is draggable when the interaction mode is "Drag".

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.DragLines
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the lines are linked when the horizontal or vertical line is dragged when the interaction mode is "Drag".

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.DragThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum distance from the horizontal or vertical line that the marker can be dragged.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.Interaction
member.summary: Gets or sets the interaction mode of the LineMarker.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.Lines
member.summary: Gets or sets the visibility of the LineMarker lines.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.HorizontalPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of horizontal line.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.VerticalPosition
member.summary: Gets or set the position of vertical line.

member.name: E:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.PositionChanged
member.summary: Occurs after the LineMarker's position changes.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1LineMarker.OnApplyTemplate
member.summary: Builds the visual tree for the control when a new template is applied.
member.remarks: This method is invoked whenever application code or an internal process, such as a rebuilding layout pass, calls the method.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1RangeSelector
member.summary: Represents a FlexChart range slider control supporting additional visual styles.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1RangeSelector.SelectedAreaBrush
member.summary: Gets or sets the brush of selected area.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1RangeSelector.PixelsToUnits(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts pixels to it´s corresponding unit value in the range slider

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Interaction.C1RangeSelector.UpdateTrackLayout
member.summary: This method will take the current min, max, and value to calculate and layout the current control measurements.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.LegendItemFormatEventArgs
member.summary: Provides event arguments for LegendFormat event.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.LegendItemFormatEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the legend item text.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.LegendItemFormatEventArgs.Item
member.summary: Gets data object associated with the legend item.
member.remarks: For the FlexChart, it returns a Series instance.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PlotArea.Row
member.summary: Gets or sets the row index of plot area.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PlotArea.Column
member.summary: Gets or sets the column index of the plot area.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PlotArea.PlotAreaName
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot area name.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PlotArea.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the plot area.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.PlotArea.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the Height of the plot area.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RadarSeries.ChartType
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart type.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of Histogram class.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.GetValues(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the array of data values.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.BinMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the _mode of histogram bin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.BinWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a positive decimal number for the range of a bin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.OverflowBin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to create a bin for all values above it.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.UnderflowBin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to create a bin for all values below or equal to it.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.NumberOfBins
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of bins for the histogram, including the overflow and underflow bins.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.ShowOverflowBin
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the histogram shows the overflow bin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.ShowUnderflowBin
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the histogram shows the underflow bin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RangedHistogram.SortDescending
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the ranged histogram sort descending.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.GetValues(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the point data array for the specified coordinate dimension.
member.param: Specifies the dimension of data to retrieve (0=Y data, 1=X data, 2=Y1 data, ...)
member.returns: The point data array for the specified coordinate dimension

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.GetDataType(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the data type by dimension index.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.HitTest(System.Windows.Point,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Performs hit testing for the series.
member.param: Whether to test distance from connecting lines.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.MemberPaths
member.summary: Gets the array of member bindings for the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.BindingX
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains X values for the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.Binding
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains Y values for the series.
member.remarks: For complex chart types it may contain several names separated by commas.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of objects that contains the series data.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.Style
member.summary: Gets or sets the series style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.AltStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the alternative series style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.SymbolStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the series symbol style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.DataLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the series data label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.IsHitTestVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the series is visible for hit testing methods.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.ChartType
member.summary: Gets or sets the series chart type.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.Visibility
member.summary: Gets or sets the series visibility.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.SymbolMarker
member.summary: Gets or sets the shape of marker to use for each data point in the series. Applies to Scatter, LineSymbols, and SplineSymbols chart types.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.SymbolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size(in pixels) of the symbols used to render this Series. Applies to Scatter, LineSymbols, and SplineSymbols chart types.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.SeriesName
member.summary: Gets or sets the series display name.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.AxisX
member.summary: Gets or sets the series x-axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.AxisY
member.summary: Gets or sets the series y-axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.Chart
member.summary: Gets or sets the series parent chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.StackingGroup
member.summary: Gets or sets the group index for series, only effect in bar and column chart type.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.LegendGroup
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the legend group for the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.Tooltip
member.summary: Gets or sets the tooltip template string for the series.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string that represents the current series.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.OnSymbolRendering(C1.Chart.IRenderEngine,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double)
member.returns: Whether to perform default symbol rendering.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.HasCustomSymbol
member.summary: Whether the custom symbol rendering involved.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Series.GetItem(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets data item by its index.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1Sunburst.ChildItemsPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property (or properties) used to generate child items in hierarchical data. Set this property to a string to specify the name of the property that contains an item's child items (e.g. Items). If items at different levels child items with different names, then set this property to an array containing the names of the properties. that contains child items at each level. (e.g. "accounts,checks,earnings")

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.BindingName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains the name of the data item.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.ChartType
member.summary: Gets or sets the tree map type.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.ChildItemsPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property of collection that contains child items.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.MaxDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of displayed node levels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.SelectedItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected data item.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.DataLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the data label.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1TreeMap.HitTest(System.Windows.Point)
member.summary: Gets a HitTestInfo object with information about the specified point.
member.returns: A HitTestInfo object with information about the point.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.X
member.summary: Gets the top let x-coordinate of the node rectangle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.Y
member.summary: Gets the top let y-coordinate of the node rectangle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.Width
member.summary: Gets the width of the node rectangle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.Height
member.summary: Gets the height of the node rectangle.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.Item
member.summary: Gets the data item of the node.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.Depth
member.summary: Gets the depth of the node

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderNodeEventArgs.IsTitle
member.summary: Gets if the node is a Title node or not

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine
member.summary: Represents a trend line for FlexChart and FinancialChart.
member.remarks: A trendline is a line superimposed on a chart revealing the overall direction of data. You may define a different fit type for each @see:TrendLine object that you add to the @see:FlexChart series collection by setting the fitType property.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of TrendLine class.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.FitType
member.summary: Gets or sets the fit type of trend line.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.Order
member.summary: Gets or sets the order of trend line. The order defines number of terms in polynom equation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.SampleCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the sample count for function calculation.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.MinX
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimal x-value.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.MaxX
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximal x-value.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.GetValues(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the array of data values.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.TrendLine.GetRegressionStatistics
member.summary: Gets statistical information about the regression.
member.returns: RegressionStatistics class with calculated statistincal characteristics.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall
member.summary: Represents a Waterfall series for FlexChart.
member.remarks: The series is normally used to demonstrate how the starting position either increases or decreases through a series of changes.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.ConnectorLines
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show connector lines.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.IntermediateTotalLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the property that contains the label of the intermediate total bar, it should be an array or a string.
member.remarks: The property should work with and properties.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.IntermediateTotalPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the property that contains the index for positions of the intermediate total bar.
member.remarks: The property should work with and properties.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.RelativeData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether the given data is relative.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.ShowIntermediateTotal
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to show the intermediate total bar.
member.remarks: The property should work with and properties.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.ShowTotal
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether show total bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines the value of the start bar. If start is null, start bar will not show.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.StartLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the label of the start bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.TotalLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the label of the total bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.StartStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the StartStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.TotalStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the TotalStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.FallingStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the FallingStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.RisingStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the RisingStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.IntermediateTotalStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the IntermediateTotalStyle property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Waterfall.ConnectorLineStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the ConnectorLineStyle property.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Resources.C1_WPF_FlexChart
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Resources.C1_WPF_FlexChart.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis
member.summary: Represents an axis in the chart.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an instance of Axis class.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis title.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show axis labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis position.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Origin
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis origin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Reversed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the axis is reversed.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LabelAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the angle of rotation for axis labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LabelMin
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the minimum axis value is always labeled.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LabelMax
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the maximum axis value is always labeled.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Format
member.summary: Gets or set formatting string for axis labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MajorTickMarks
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the appearance of major tick marks.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MajorGrid
member.summary: Gets or set a value indicating whether to draw major grid.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MajorUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance betweem axis labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MinorTickMarks
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the appearance of minor tick marks.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MinorGrid
member.summary: Gets or set a value indicating whether to draw minor grid.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MinorUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance between minor ticks and grid lines.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.AxisLine
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw axis line.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis minimum.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis maximum.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LogBase
member.summary: Gets or sets the base for logarithmic axis.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LogBaseProperty
member.summary: Backing field for the LogBase property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LabelAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis labels alignment.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.LabelAlignmentProperty
member.summary: Backing field for the LabelAlignment property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Style
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis group style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.TitleStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis title style.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MajorGridStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of axis major grid.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.MinorGridStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of axis minor grid.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.OverlappingLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating how to handle the overlapping axis labels.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Scrollbar
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis scroll bar.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the items source for the axis labels.
member.remarks: Names of the properties are specified by the Binding property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Binding
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-separated property names for the DataSource property to use in axis labels.
member.remarks: The first name specifies the value on the axis, the second represents the corresponding axis label.The default value is "Value,Text".

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.PlotAreaName
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot area name for the axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.StaggeredLines
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of staggered lines for axis labels.
member.remarks: The default value is 1 and all axis labels are drawn on the same level.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.TimeUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the units for a time based axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.ActualMajorUnit
member.summary: Gets the actual axis major unit.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.ActualMinorUnit
member.summary: Gets the actual axis major unit.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Convert(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts the specified value from data to pixel coordinate.
member.returns: The corresponding value in control pixel coordinate.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.ConvertBack(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts the specified value from control pixel to data coordinate.
member.param: The value in control pixel coordinate.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.Chart
member.summary: Gets or sets the axis parent chart.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the group names

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupItemsPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the group names

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupSeparator
member.summary: Gets or sets the group separator

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the group provider

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupTitleAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the alignment of the group title.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.GroupVisibilityLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the limiting level of visible collapsible groups.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.TitleAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the rotation angle of the axis title.
member.remarks: The angle is measured in degrees.

member.name: F:C1.WPF.Chart.Axis.TitleAngleProperty
member.summary: Identifies the Axis title angle dependency property.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.ChartType
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart type.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.Stacking
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart stacking.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.Rotated
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the chart is rotated.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.RenderMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the render mode.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.BindingX
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that contains X values for the series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.PlotMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot area margin.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.AxisX
member.summary: Gets or sets the main chart x-axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.AxisY
member.summary: Gets or sets the main chart y-axis.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets the chart options.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.PlotAreas
member.summary: Gets the chart plot areas collection.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.SelectedSeries
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected series.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.DataLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the data label.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.PlotRect
member.summary: Returns plot area rectangle (rectangle inside chart axes).

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.AxesOnTop
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the chart axes are drawing on the top of data.

member.name: E:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.SeriesVisibilityChanged
member.summary: Fires when chart series visibility was changed.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.HitTest(System.Windows.Point)
member.summary: Gets a HitTestInfo object with information about the specified point.
member.returns: A HitTestInfo object with information about the point.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.HitTest(System.Windows.Point,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets a HitTestInfo object with information about the specified point.
member.param: Whether to include connecting lines between data points. If testLines=false only data points are used for hit testing.
member.returns: A HitTestInfo object with information about the point.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.PointToData(System.Windows.Point,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a Point from control coordinates to chart data coordinates.
member.param: If true the method returns data coordinates according to the axes of current plot area. By default (usePlotArea=false) it always uses the main chart axes (AxisX and AxisY).
member.returns: The point in chart data coordinates.

member.name: M:C1.WPF.Chart.C1FlexChart.DataToPoint(System.Windows.Point)
member.summary: Converts a Point from data coordinates to control coordinates.

member.name: T:C1.WPF.Chart.ImageFormat
member.summary: Represents the format used to encode an image into a stream.

member.name: P:C1.WPF.Chart.RenderDataLabelEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Data label text. It can be changed in event handler.
